docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZULETA, JEPTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMOS, JULIO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, DEFENDANT JULIO RAMOS NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, JULIO
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMOS, JULIO HEARING SET FOR JAN-16-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JULIO RAMOS SET FOR JAN-16-2009 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. PARTIES SETTLED ON JANUARY 16, 2009. DEFAULT JUDGMENT VACATED. DEFENDANT ADMITS NO LIABILITY AND AGREED TO PAY. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMSSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILLIP HWEE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZULETA, JEPTE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, JULIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2008 - CONTINUED TO DEC-10-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. SPANISH INTERPRETER REQUESTED FOR THE PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZULETA, JEPTE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ELLEN ROSENTHAL PRESENT. ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JULIO RAMOS IS GRANTED. MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED, CLAIM DISMISSED. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
